channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: US inflation jumped to 4.2% in May amid Middle East energy shock
item.description: <![CDATA[US inflation jumped to 4.2% in May amid Middle East energy shock]]>

item.title: Oracle to spend $70bn on data centre build-out in coming year

item.description: <![CDATA[Oracle’s stock slides after earnings, as the steep price of AI spooks investors]]>

item.title: Micron, Intel drag the tech sector into a new bearish phase. Will the correction last this time?
item.description: <![CDATA[Micron, Intel drag the tech sector into a new bearish phase. Will the correction last this time?]]>

item.title: Trump suggests he may not renew trade deal with Mexico and Canada

item.title: Social Security is facing a 22% cliff — 4 ways to build an income stream Washington can’t touch

item.title: What happened to the great rebirth of American manufacturing?

item.title: US tech stocks sink as volatility flares up on Wall Street

item.title: Bitcoin bulls are still around. These charts show they just moved on to hotter markets.
